_note: Sprite config edited by tools/sprite-tool.html. Per character: `global` defaults + `sheets` keyed by STATE name (idle/walk/run/prejump/air/land/...) or a move's animKey (jab/cross/pistolaim/...). Per-sheet keys: src, cols, rows, cw, ch, start, frames, fps, mode, scale, offX, offY, tint. mode = loop | once | syncMove | jumpStart | jumpAir | jumpLand.
